name: Featherweight v1
description: A 100-question multi-choice benchmark for the featherweight class of language models (sub-1B-parameter). Ten categories of ten questions each: geography, history, arithmetic, science, language, vocabulary, common sense, logical reasoning, categorization, reading comprehension. Answer positions balanced 25/25/25/25 across A/B/C/D so position bias scores at chance.
intended_use: Comparing small language models on basic capabilities. A 200M-class model trained on a general corpus should score meaningfully above 25% chance with headroom for improvement.
scoring: 1 point per correct answer. Report accuracy and per-category breakdown.
